25:30 â December 30, 2025
Update to the Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725
We updated the
Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725
, as announced in the
2026 Indicative Pricing for Payment Services
notice published September 22, 2025.
There is an additional change to Section 6.2, Fraud Advisory Services (Optional). Our vendor increased their fees which affected all items in this section. This change was communicated to Central 1 late in the year. All services in this section are optional.
Please note that the amount of the fee for âOutgoing Wires Other Currenciesâ is the same amount as the fee for âOutgoing Wires to Canada (CAD)â. See Section 2.8, Incoming and Outgoing Wire Fees for details.
The Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725, is available to BC and Ontario Class A credit unions only. The fee changes come into effect January 1, 2025.
